_comment: Target-query set for GSC position tracking (bm#29 item 4). Tier-1 v1, 2026-06-09. Aspirational targets — current GSC presence ~0; we measure avg position progress toward page 1-3 for THIS set, not the noisy all-query average. Queries matched case-insensitively against GSC query dimension. Adjustable anytime — just config.
